evidence.snippet: Vio series is an advanced lightweight EO/IR payload, featuring a 4K zoom sensor, a 640x512 radiometric thermal camera, and an integrated 2400m laser rangefinder, ready for various industrial applications.

LYNX redefines aerial intelligence for critical operations. It integrates ultra-compact design, dual-spectrum EO/IR imaging with up to 4K/60fps HDR, and intelligent AI for autonomous detection and tracking. This unparalleled synergy delivers macro-insight from previously impossible angles, empowering decisive action in the most challenging environments.

Aevo is the latest generation of heavy-lifting aerial gimbals, boasting a sturdy carbon frame construction, upgraded encoder, and a massive payload capability to give your system a remarkable level of stability and reliability.

Designed for high speed
UAVs with up to 100km/h

items.notes: Gremsy's core product lines are drone camera gimbals and EO/IR/thermal/LRF payloads for UAVs.

ndaa.notes: LYNX has an explicit 'Lynx NDAA (Boson 640)' variant. Gremsy T3 product page shows NDAA certification icon alongside Blue UAS icon.

evidence.snippet: Gremsy is pleased to announce that the VIO F1, our advanced (EO/IR/LRF) payload, has officially been added to the Blue UAS Framework. This achievement marks a significant step forward in the company’s mission to provide secure, reliable, and high-performance UAV imaging solutions in multiple applications.

By meeting the security and interoperability requirements of the DIU’s Blue UAS program, the VIO F1 is not only an innovative payload but also a commercial enabler for businesses seeking reliable UAV imaging solutions.
![](/assets/images/cer-icon-ndaa.png)    ![](/assets/images/cer-icon-blueuas.png)

blue_uas.notes: VIO F1 officially added to the DIU Blue UAS Framework (April 2025). T3 product page also shows Blue UAS certification icon.

readiness.notes: Multiple product SKUs available via online store with ORDER NOW / Buy Now links. VIO F1 assembled in US; VIO G1 in Vietnam. Custom Gimbals engineering service also offered as secondary.

tagline: Vietnam-based gimbal and ISR payload manufacturer in production across tiny, light, mid-size, and heavy platforms (Pixy, Mio, T3, T7, AEVO lines) plus EO/IR and zoom sensors (VIO, LYNX, ORUS L, ZIO). NDAA-compliant and Blue UAS certified. Limited public evidence on U.S. government contracts or integration status with major primes.
